blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add explicit evidence for parts deposit conditions
Verify that the parts deposit is only applied when a special order is made.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Parts deposit if special order', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that a parts deposit was collected for a special order scenario. While the linked use case mentions a parts deposit of $280, it does not clarify whether this deposit is specifically for a special order or if it applies to all parts. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the specific condition of the deposit being tied to a special order.
gaps: No explicit evidence confirming that the parts deposit is specifically for a special order.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add explicit evidence for parts deposit conditions
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the parts deposit is only applied when a special order is made.
